texto: But, when the work was finished, the Craftsman kept wishing that there were someone to ponder the plan of so great a work, to love its beauty, and to wonder at its vastness.
explicacao: Citação de Giovanni Pico della Mirandola sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “But, when the work was finished, the Craftsman kept wishing that there were someone to ponder the…” articula amor, love, work em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e work.

texto: We have made thee neither of heaven nor of earth,Neither mortal or immortal, So that with freedom of choice and with honor, As thought the maker and molder of thyself, Thou mayest fashion thyself in whatever shape thou shalt prefer. Thou shalt have the power out of thy soul's judgment, to be reborn into the higher forms, which are divine.
